queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Strawberry Perl (64-bit)' AND publisher = 'strawberryperl.com project';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Strawberry Perl (64-bit)' AND publisher = 'strawberryperl.com project' AND version_compare(version, '5.42.2.1') < 0);
